_comment: Policy replay output — which policy was active at audit record aud-002-example.
_note: Policy replay reconstructs historical policy state from frozen version chain. Used by the counterfactual bench.

counterfactualUnderCandidate._explanation: Under candidate policy, the session_rpe constraint (7.5) would have been satisfied at the recorded RPE level, whereas under baseline (8.0) the constraint was violated at RPE 8.1.
